productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Rally White Shoe
description: Walk on air in these Air Rally shoes from nike. These shoes are a fresh take on a design and can be teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Leather uppers with perforations for maximum breathability and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and lightly padded tongue for greater comfort Swoosh logo perforated on the sides and brand tab on the tongue Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Phylon midsole with AirSole unit in the heel for maximum impact protection and superior cushioning Outsole Rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for traction and durability Flex grooves for greater flexibilty of the feet shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
